builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on Seven's Lightning Ball ability. Great for farming, spawned minions, and slowing enemies. Awful vs High HP enemies, Aerial, or dispersed teams.
builds.name: Ball

builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on Seven's Stun. Great for Aerial/Diving characters. Doest deal allot of damage, but great for countering dives.
builds.name: Stun

builds.build_description_eng: Closest thing to hybrid Seven has. Great at shredding groups and tanks. Awful against Aerial/TinyHitBox/Fast enemies.
builds.name: Power Surge

builds.name: GVS - Power Surge
